scripts.build: bun run build:helper && bun run build:triggers && rollup -c
scripts.build:helper: dotnet publish helper -c Release && shx cp helper/bin/Release/net8.0-windows/win-x64/publish/QuickbitsHelper.exe dev.aryapaw.quickbits.sdPlugin/helper/
scripts.build:triggers: dotnet publish triggers/SkydimoTrigger.ScreenSync -c Release && dotnet publish triggers/SkydimoTrigger.ScreenStatic -c Release && shx mkdir -p dev.aryapaw.quickbits.sdPlugin/triggers/skydimo-screen-sync && shx mkdir -p dev.aryapaw.quickbits.sdPlugin/triggers/skydimo-screen-static && shx cp triggers/SkydimoTrigger.ScreenSync/bin/Release/net8.0-windows10.0.22621.0/win-x64/publish/SkydimoTrigger.ScreenSync.exe dev.aryapaw.quickbits.sdPlugin/triggers/skydimo-screen-sync/ && shx cp triggers/SkydimoTrigger.ScreenStatic/bin/Release/net8.0-windows10.0.22621.0/win-x64/publish/SkydimoTrigger.ScreenStatic.exe dev.aryapaw.quickbits.sdPlugin/triggers/skydimo-screen-static/
